full_description: use the specified hand to move the block to the other grid and then return it
schema: {A} denotes the block and {B} denotes the specified hand. The instruction intentionally does not reveal grid colors or locations.
preference: Mention the specified hand, but do not reveal grid colors or locations.
seen: Use {B} to move {A} to the other grid, then return it.
Use {B} to place {A} on the other grid, then put it back.
Use {B} to move the cube away and then return it to the start grid.
Use {B} to move {A} to the other grid and back.
Use {B} to transfer {A} to the other grid, then restore it.
unseen: With {B}, move {A} to the other grid and back.
Use {B} to put {A} on the other grid, then return it.
Use {B} to carry the cube across and bring it back.
Move {A} to the other grid and back using {B}.
Use {B} to complete the out-and-back block move.
